response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of highly relevant engineering experience, perfectly aligning with the role's required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB). His recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, combined with his exceptional background in TDD and testing frameworks, makes him an outstanding fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Exceptional expertise in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Current Staff/Founder titles suggest he may be overqualified for a standard Senior IC role
Short tenure at his most recent position
Heavy historical use of niche languages (Dlang, Ember) might indicate a preference for custom or non-standard tooling
